description: Given a feature or domain name, traces its UI entry point, API/handler, database entity/table, and any emitted event, drafting/refreshing a Feature Card at .claude/knowledge/features/<feature-slug>.md. Reuses .claude/knowledge/repo-map.md and .claude/knowledge/event-map.md rather than re-deriving known facts, and optionally GitNexus for the UI-to-API call-graph hop when the repo is already indexed. Invoked by smdg-knowledge-bootstrap, or directly with a feature name.
